front: Cost Performance Index (CPI) — formula and interpretation
back:
CPI = EV / AC
CPI > 1 means under budget (earning more value than you spend).
CPI < 1 means over budget.
CPI = 1.0 is exactly on budget.

front: Schedule Performance Index (SPI) — formula and interpretation
back:
SPI = EV / PV
SPI > 1 means ahead of schedule.
SPI < 1 means behind schedule.
SPI = 1.0 is on schedule.

front: Estimate at Completion (EAC) when current variances are typical
back:
EAC = BAC / CPI
Use when current cost performance is expected to continue for the rest of the project.
